articles.title: SEC Chair Gary Gensler Warns of Imminent Crypto Crackdown, Explains Why Proof of Reserves Has No Value: Report
articles.description: The Chair of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) reportedly says that a crackdown on the crypto industry is imminent in the wake of FTX’s high-profile collapse. According to a new report by Bloomberg, SEC Chair Gary Gensler says that the regulatory agency is coming after crypto firms that don’t comply with its rules, […]

articles.description: Whales showed a new found interest in XRP Despite metrics against XRP, indicators stood in favor and were positive The ongoing crypto winter has prevented most cryptocurrencies from increasing their values. articles.description: DeGods and y00ts, two of Solana's leading non-fungible token (NFT) collections, have announced plans to move to Ethereum and Polygon.

articles.title: Coin Bureau Says 2023 Could Be Big Year for Ethereum, Details Forecast for ETH and Polkadot (DOT)
articles.description: Wildly popular crypto analyst Guy of Coin Bureau is unveiling his forecasts for Ethereum (ETH) and Polkadot (DOT) as markets gear up for a new year. In a new Q&A update, Guy says that Ethereum’s Shanghai upgrade, which will allow ETH to be unstaked, could make 2023 a big year for the leading smart contract […] The post Coin Bureau Says 2023 Could Be Big Year for Ethereum, Details Forecast for ETH and Polkadot (DOT) appeared first on The Daily Hodl.

articles.title: Ethereum Fundamentals Look Good, But Analysts Predict Price Pain Ahead
articles.description: Fundamentally, Ethereum has never looked in a better shape. However, ETH price action has not reflected this.
